summary: Adds `factory:intake-rejected` label, provisions it on bootstrap, applies it on deterministic intake rejections (missing form or insufficient permissions), and clears it on successful intake. Tests and CI cover the behavior.

requirement_checks.requirement: Factory label bootstrap defines the rejection label
evidence: scripts/lib/factory-config.mjs:1-12 (FACTORY_LABELS includes intakeRejected) and scripts/lib/factory-config.mjs:98-103 (LABEL_DEFINITIONS entry for FACTORY_LABELS.intakeRejected)

requirement_checks.requirement: Missing form applies the rejection label
evidence: tests/prepare-intake.test.mjs:29-68 (unit test asserts addLabels called with FACTORY_LABELS.intakeRejected when form is incomplete)

requirement_checks.requirement: Unauthorized requester applies the rejection label
evidence: tests/prepare-intake.test.mjs:71-105 (unit test asserts addLabels called with FACTORY_LABELS.intakeRejected when permission is read)

requirement_checks.requirement: Successful intake clears the rejection label
evidence: tests/prepare-intake.test.mjs:107-176 (happy-path unit test asserts removeLabel called) and scripts/prepare-intake.mjs:60-66,87 (clearRejectionLabel calls removeLabel)
README.md:143-156 (Labels list includes `factory:intake-rejected` and descriptive parenthetical)

findings.title: Missing run artifact: repair-log.md
findings.details: The artifact contract allows a `repair-log.md` in `.factory/runs/<issue>/`. This run does not include `.factory/runs/45/repair-log.md`. This is informational and does not affect acceptance tests for this change.
findings.recommendation: Optionally add an empty `repair-log.md` to the run directory for artifact completeness, or document why it's omitted.
